dataset: MedinTux DrTuxTest database with synthetic clinical data seeded by setup_task.sh

pi_items.source: Live DB query: SELECT FchGnrl_NomDos FROM IndexNomPrenom WHERE FchGnrl_Prenom='Marie-Claire' AND FchGnrl_Type='Dossier' returns 'DUBOIS'. Evidence: db_patient_demographics.txt
Live DB query confirms FchGnrl_Prenom='Marie-Claire'. Evidence: db_patient_demographics.txt
RubriquesBlobs PK=93 (consultation dated 2026-02-15) contains 'DFG estime (CKD-EPI) = 32 ml/min/1.73m2'. This is the most recent DFG for DUBOIS. Evidence: db_full_blob_content.txt line 4
RubriquesBlobs PK=92 (consultation dated 2025-06-15) contains 'DFG estime (CKD-EPI) = 48 ml/min/1.73m2'. This is the older/stale value. Evidence: db_full_blob_content.txt line 3
Alert document states branch a = DFG < 45 ml/min. DUBOIS recent DFG=32 < 45, so branch a is correct. Evidence: alert_document_content.txt line 19

Alert document branch a: 'Substituer par Sitagliptine 50mg, 1 comprime par jour'. DUBOIS terrain (PK=90) has NO allergy entries (only HTA, T2DM, IRC). So default branch a substitution applies. Evidence: alert_document_content.txt lines 21-22, db_full_blob_content.txt line 1
DUBOIS terrain blob (PK=90) contains only 'Maladie' entries (HTA, T2DM, IRC). No 'Allergique' keyword present. Evidence: db_full_blob_content.txt line 1

Alert document: 'Pour tout changement de classe medicamenteuse (cas a uniquement), prevoir un rendez-vous de controle dans les 15 jours'. Branch a = class change = follow-up required. Evidence: alert_document_content.txt lines 37-39
Live DB query confirms FchGnrl_NomDos='MARTIN'. Evidence: db_patient_demographics.txt
Live DB query confirms FchGnrl_Prenom='Sophie'. Evidence: db_patient_demographics.txt
RubriquesBlobs PK=96 (biologie dated 2026-01-20) contains 'DFG (CKD-EPI): 55 ml/min/1.73m2'. This is the only DFG for MARTIN. Evidence: db_full_blob_content.txt line 7
Alert document states branch b = DFG 45-60 ml/min. MARTIN DFG=55, which is in [45,60]. Evidence: alert_document_content.txt line 27
Alert document branch b: 'Passer de Metformine 850mg a Metformine 500mg, meme posologie'. Evidence: alert_document_content.txt lines 29-30
MARTIN terrain blob (PK=94) contains only 'Maladie' entries (HTA, T2DM, Dyslipidemie). No 'Allergique' keyword. Evidence: db_full_blob_content.txt line 5
Alert specifies follow-up only for 'cas a uniquement' (class change). Branch b is dose reduction, not class change. Evidence: alert_document_content.txt line 37
Live DB query confirms FchGnrl_NomDos='PETIT'. Evidence: db_patient_demographics.txt
Live DB query confirms FchGnrl_Prenom='Nathalie'. Evidence: db_patient_demographics.txt

RubriquesBlobs PK=99 (consultation dated 2026-02-28) contains 'DFG CKD-EPI a 92 ml/min/1.73m2' embedded in narrative French text. This is the only DFG for PETIT. Evidence: db_full_blob_content.txt line 10
Alert document states branch c = DFG > 60 ml/min. PETIT DFG=92 > 60. Evidence: alert_document_content.txt line 32
Alert document branch c: 'Remplacer par Glucophage 850mg (fabricant: Merck Sante)'. Evidence: alert_document_content.txt lines 34-35
PETIT terrain blob (PK=97) contains only 'DIABETE TYPE 2 = Maladie'. No 'Allergique' keyword. Evidence: db_full_blob_content.txt line 8
Alert specifies follow-up only for 'cas a' (class change). Branch c is manufacturer switch, not class change. Evidence: alert_document_content.txt line 37
Live DB query confirms FchGnrl_NomDos='HENRY'. Evidence: db_patient_demographics.txt
Live DB query confirms FchGnrl_Prenom='Emmanuel'. Evidence: db_patient_demographics.txt
RubriquesBlobs PK=102 (biologie dated 2026-03-01) contains 'DFG (CKD-EPI): 38 ml/min/1.73m2'. This is the only DFG for HENRY. Evidence: db_full_blob_content.txt line 13
Alert document states branch a = DFG < 45 ml/min. HENRY DFG=38 < 45. Evidence: alert_document_content.txt line 19

Branch a default is Sitagliptine 50mg. However, HENRY terrain (PK=100) documents 'GLIPTINES (DPP-4) = Allergique, Actif'. Alert fallback: 'En cas d'allergie documentee aux gliptines: substituer par Repaglinide 1mg'. So the fallback applies. Evidence: alert_document_content.txt lines 23-25, db_full_blob_content.txt line 11

HENRY terrain blob (PK=100) contains 'GLIPTINES (DPP-4) = Allergique , Actif'. This means the default branch a substitution (Sitagliptine) is contraindicated, creating a trap. Evidence: db_full_blob_content.txt line 11

Exact string in terrain blob (PK=100): 'GLIPTINES (DPP-4) = Allergique , Actif'. The metadata uses mixed case 'Gliptines' while the DB stores 'GLIPTINES' (uppercase). Both refer to the same allergy. Evidence: db_full_blob_content.txt line 11
Branch a = class change -> follow-up required within 15 days per alert. Evidence: alert_document_content.txt lines 37-39
Alert document header: 'ALERTE DE SECURITE N. CRPV-2026-0847'. Evidence: alert_document_content.txt line 2
Task description instructs agent to save CSV to this path. Verified ~/Documents/ directory exists and is writable by ga user. Evidence: documents_directory_listing.txt

All 4 prescription blobs (PK=91,95,98,101) have TypeRub=20020100 and contain XML ordonnance content. Cross-referenced with MedinTux schema in other tasks (chronic_panel_audit, polypharmacy_review_and_update). Evidence: db_rubrics_summary.txt
All 3 consultation blobs (PK=92,93,99) have TypeRub=20030000 and contain consultation note HTML. Evidence: db_rubrics_summary.txt
All 4 terrain blobs (PK=90,94,97,100) have TypeRub=20060000 and contain [Antecedents] structured text. Evidence: db_rubrics_summary.txt
Both biologie blobs (PK=96,102) have TypeRub=20080000 and contain lab result HTML. Evidence: db_rubrics_summary.txt
Design parameter in verifier stub. Consistent with task design (requires correctly handling 2-3 of 4 patients for a pass).

privileged_info_summary: This task requires responding to pharmacovigilance alert CRPV-2026-0847 about NDMA-contaminated Metformine 850mg. The alert document at ~/Documents/alerte_pharmacovigilance_metformine.txt contains a 3-branch substitution algorithm based on renal function (DFG). Exactly 4 patients are affected (all others have no Metformine prescriptions): (1) DUBOIS Marie-Claire has DFG=32 ml/min (from a consultation dated 2026-02-15; an older consultation from 2025-06-15 shows a stale DFG=48 which must NOT be used). Her current prescription is Ramipril 5mg + Metformine 850mg + Atorvastatine 20mg. Correct action: stop Metformine, substitute Sitagliptine 50mg, preserve Ramipril and Atorvastatine, schedule follow-up within 15 days. (2) MARTIN Sophie has DFG=55 ml/min (from biologie dated 2026-01-20). Current prescription: Amlodipine 5mg + Metformine 850mg + Simvastatine 20mg. Correct action: reduce Metformine to 500mg (same posology), preserve Amlodipine and Simvastatine, no follow-up required. (3) PETIT Nathalie has DFG=92 ml/min (embedded in narrative text of consultation dated 2026-02-28). Current prescription: Metformine 850mg only (monotherapy). Correct action: switch to Glucophage 850mg (manufacturer change), no follow-up required. (4) HENRY Emmanuel has DFG=38 ml/min (from biologie dated 2026-03-01) AND a documented allergy to GLIPTINES (DPP-4) in his terrain. Current prescription: Losartan 50mg + Metformine 850mg + Insuline Lantus 20UI. Correct action: stop Metformine, substitute Repaglinide 1mg (NOT Sitagliptine due to gliptine allergy), preserve Losartan and Insuline Lantus, schedule follow-up within 15 days. Each patient must receive a consultation note referencing 'CRPV-2026-0847' or 'pharmacovigilance'. The agent must also save a summary CSV to ~/Documents/rapport_pharmacovigilance_CRPV-2026-0847.csv with columns Nom,Prenom,DFG,Action,Nouveau_Medicament listing all 4 patients.
